name: RunMode
summary: Provides enumerated constants for a command running mode. This is currently interactive or scripted.

enum_values.name: Interactive
enum_values.summary: Can use dialogs for input. Must use message boxes to report serious error conditions.

enum_values.name: Scripted
enum_values.summary: All input must come from command line, GetPoint, GetObject, GetString, etc. Must use message boxes to report serious error conditions. Script mode gets used when a command is run with a hyphen (-) prefix.
